message:
fix(learn): await Promise params for Next.js 16 compatibility

Dynamic routes [slug] and [tool] were treating params as sync objects
instead of awaiting the Promise, causing 404 errors on /learn/welcome
and other dynamic pages.

Next.js 15+ requires params to be awaited in App Router.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
